title: Hidden Trails-Visual Pack - Green/Grey
description: A custom resource pack for Hidden Trails that softens visuals, unifies modded and vanilla textures, and enhances immersion with subtle UI tweaks and shader-friendly tones - perfectly tailored to the atmosphere of the modpack.
body:
# 🌿 Hidden Trails – Visual Pack: Green & Grey Edition
_A grounded, weathered world - subtle, subdued, and immersive._

The **Green & Grey Edition** of the Hidden Trails Visual Pack brings a calm, natural tone to your adventure. Designed to blend with the misty forests, mossy ruins, and stone-worn trails of the **Hidden Trails** modpack, it enhances the Minecraft experience with a more muted and earthy visual style.

![GreenGrey-HiddenTrails-VisualPack-Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381c519578764b31d2a0f822e2d4707eafa00a66_0.webp)

**🪨 Natural Consistency**
This handcrafted resource pack focuses on clean, cohesive visuals - reworking blocks, items, GUIs, and menus to feel more lived-in and rustic. The green-grey palette supports immersion, helping the world feel older, softer, and more mysterious without losing the charm of vanilla Minecraft.

Unlike high-contrast or fantasy-heavy packs, this version avoids visual clutter. Instead, it favors clarity, subtle noise, and smooth UI tweaks - perfect for quiet exploration, survival moments, and the immersive storytelling that Hidden Trails is built around.

**🌫️ Rooted in the old world. Ready for the journey ahead.**

## 🧱 Block and Item Enhancements:

- Softened palettes for terrain and building materials
- Subtle noise and texture refinements to support shaders
- Designed to blend well with biome variety and structure-heavy environments
- Reworked item icons with a subtle, hand-crafted look that fits the world’s tone

## 🖥️ GUI Improvements:

- Cleaner inventory, crafting, and container screens
- Matching color themes and smoother edges
- Interfaces that feel more fantasy-oriented without being overbearing

## 💡 Additional Notes:

- Fully compatible with shaders like BSL, Solas, and Pastel
- Does not override other mod textures — keeps the modpack’s identity intact
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
Whether you’re exploring windswept ruins or preparing for your next boss hunt, the Hidden Trails Visual Pack ensures the world always feels immersive, cohesive, and alive.

## 🧩 Mod Support

Fully supports popular UI-based mods like JEI (Just Enough Items), JustEnoughProfessions, and JustEnoughResources (JER) - ensuring a consistent and clean look throughout your inventory and interface.
